violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

(Various food product ) was observed held at (49-55) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings through establishment ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
(Various food product ) were observed stored on the floor in the (basement ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between and between the wall and electrical pipes. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

(Cookline prep unit) located in the (kitchen ) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures observed at 50DF. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS foods in unit until repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces o have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -exterior of all rice cookers -food carts -prep table shelves -all refrigeration units -non food contact of can opener New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
The food prep sink observed in poor repair. Observed leak at plumbing.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

The sink used for food preparation and ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

The floors in kitchen and basement have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

The presence of (rodent) is not controlled as evidenced by droppings throughout kitchen and basement. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Per PIC, last pcs was in June 2024. Next service is scheduled for July26,2024. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

Inspector observed live rodent on bait trap in basement area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies.PIC removed rodent from premises. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

Knives were stored on an unclean surface (between wall and electric pipe) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location.PIC removed knives to warewashing area to be wash and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the food storage shelves(and cart) in kitchen and basement an have an accumulation of soil, food residue, and/or rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

The floors in the kitchen and basement(including stairs) have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
The walls in kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
